message:
feat(e2e): normalize UPDATE-by-id into reusable prepared statements

Add normalize_update_by_id() to the SQL shape normalizer, turning
varying point UPDATEs like `UPDATE t SET col='x' WHERE id=3` into
parameterized templates (`UPDATE t SET col=?2 WHERE id=?1`), enabling
prepared statement reuse across different literal values.

Supporting parsers added: consume_simple_sql_literal,
consume_single_quoted_text_literal, consume_numeric_literal.

Rename normalize_simple_integer_point_sql -> normalize_simple_reusable_sql_shape
to reflect the broader scope (SELECT, DELETE, and now UPDATE).

Tests: executor shape-reuse test and oplog churn-gate test confirm
parser invocation count stays below executed op count for repeated
varying-point updates.

Also clean up perf_runner HarnessSettings construction to use struct
update syntax.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
